rationales.hook_strength: 'Backing off makes you stronger' is a solid contrarian hook with a concrete mechanism, but 'nervous system recovers slower' in the sub is a mouthful for a cover glance.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is a single, scannable idea with a clear label and one actionable takeaway — trap, signs, fix, payoff flow is tight.
rationales.audience_fit: Deloading is gym-bro vocabulary; the busy, tired-by-3pm health-curious viewer doesn't lift on a program and won't see themselves in 'stalled lifts' or 'volume.'
rationales.novelty: Deload content is extremely well-trodden on lifting TikTok — this framing adds nothing new to a concept already covered by every fitness account.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct, health claims are appropriately hedged, CTA ties naturally to recovery scoring without feeling forced.
rationales.predicted_performance: Will do fine in the strength-training niche but saves/shares will be capped because the audience ceiling is narrow gym-goers, not Vibe Health's broader health-curious target.
